description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling rectangular footprint, surrounded by a lush green lawn and mature trees. The structure features a mix of large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and views of the backyard. The backyard includes a freeform swimming pool, a patio area, and landscaped greenery, all enclosed by a white perimeter fence. The front of the bungalow has a double garage, a driveway, and a small entry path leading to the main entrance. The roof is flat, and the exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted concrete, with some wooden or stone accents. The layout is open, with visible interior divisions for living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and patio, all enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway, main entrance, and a manicured front lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard patio, swimming pool, and open living spaces with large windows.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the pool, patio, and extensive glass doors/windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the pool, patio, and the side of the garage, as well as the boundary fence and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors facing the backyard
